body.p: This is a sample document that demonstrates the googledoc output format for the redhat.dita.googledoc plugin.
It includes various DITA elements to verify rendering. Here is some bold text, italic text, bold-italic text, and monospace code.
body.note: This plugin converts DITA to Google Docs automatically using the cascading auth pattern.
Always ensure your Google Cloud project has the Docs API and Drive API enabled before running the plugin.
The plugin requires Java 17 or later.

ol.li: Install the plugin using dita install

section.title: Code Block
section.p: And here is a Java code snippet:

body.p: See DITA-OT for more information, or visit the Google Docs API documentation.
